title: Piano Teacher
description:
Join our vibrant music school as a Piano Teacher and inspire students through the art of music. You’ll help learners develop their skills, nurture their passion, and prepare them for exams and performances.

Key Responsibilities

  • Deliver high-quality piano lessons tailored to each student’s learning style, age, and skill level.
  • Monitor student progress and provide constructive feedback.
  • Prepare students for ABRSM exams, recitals, and competitions.
  • Communicate effectively with students, families, and colleagues.
  • Stay updated on teaching methods and music education trends.

Qualifications & Skills

  • ABRSM Grade 8 in Piano (Practical and Theory) or equivalent.
  • Prior teaching experience preferred, but passionate beginners welcome.
  • Strong piano proficiency for beginner to intermediate levels.
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
  • Adaptable, patient, and empathetic teaching approach.
  • Commitment to fostering an inclusive and respectful learning environment.

What We Offer

  • Competitive salary based on qualification and teaching hours.
  • Professional development through seminars and training.
  • Subsidized music courses for skill enhancement.
  • Diverse student base for a rewarding teaching experience.
  • Opportunities to participate in school events and grow professionally.

postedCompany.description:
Yamaha Music (Asia) Private Limited is a subsidiary of Yamaha Corporation since 1966. We are a multi-business giant providing many exciting music courses and dealing with various musical related products.

At Yamaha Music (Asia) Private Limited, we strive, not only for higher music literacy across the nation, but also to promote a love for all kinds of music across all ages. We offer a wide variety of music courses and music related products. That’s the reason why we are the premier music company in Singapore.

Yamaha Music (Asia) Private Limited has retail stores, music schools, and a vast network of dealers across Singapore. Fronted by dedicated sales & marketing team and supported by experienced technical and teaching personnel. Yamaha Music (Asia) Private Limited continues to provide quality products and well-researched music education programs for music lovers.

If you are inspire to become part of Yamaha family, you may look out for the available job opportunities via the following link:
https://sg.yamaha.com/en/about_yamaha/recruitment/index.html
https://sg.yamaha.com/en/education/teaching_career/index.html
